scripts.predev: pnpm --filter @motionconvert/shared build && pnpm --filter @motionconvert/db generate && pnpm --filter @motionconvert/db build && pnpm --filter @motionconvert/converter build
scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,worker,web -c blue,magenta,green "pnpm --filter @motionconvert/api dev" "pnpm --filter @motionconvert/worker dev" "pnpm --filter @motionconvert/web dev"
scripts.test: pnpm --filter @motionconvert/shared test && pnpm --filter @motionconvert/converter test && pnpm --filter @motionconvert/api test
